trades.reasoning: Top-ranked score (95) with volume surge, MACD crossover, RSI in bullish momentum zone, and price well above SMA-20 — all four key signals firing simultaneously.
Co-top score (95) with volume surge, MACD crossover, RSI 63.2 in ideal momentum zone, and price notably above SMA-20, offering a clean setup in a non-correlated sector.

decisions.briefing: Markets finished mildly positive today — S&P 500 +0.4%, NASDAQ +0.2% — a neutral, low-conviction session typical of a holiday-shortened week. With four open slots and $943 in cash, the top screener signals pointed clearly to PTON and UTI, both scoring 95 with volume surges confirming genuine institutional interest rather than noise. All six existing positions remain healthy with no stop-loss triggers evident, so the focus is on deploying idle cash into the highest-conviction setups.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on Monday as markets reopened following the Memorial Day weekend, with thin holiday-week volume keeping moves subdued across the board. The S&P 500 gained 0.4% and the NASDAQ added 0.2%, with no major macro catalysts driving direction as investors digested last week's strong tech earnings and awaited upcoming Fed speakers. Sector rotation continued in the background, with consumer discretionary and select small-caps showing outperformance while mega-cap tech consolidated recent gains.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一在陣亡將士紀念日長週末後小幅走高，但假期週成交量偏淡，整體走勢平穩。標普500指數上漲0.4%，納斯達克指數微升0.2%，市場在消化上週科技股強勁財報之際，等待聯儲局官員即將發表的講話。盤中板塊輪動持續，非必需消費品及部分小型股表現突出，而大型科技股則在近期漲幅後進入整固階段。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume spikes well above its normal daily average — often 1.5x or more. It signals that institutional investors (funds, banks) are actively buying or selling, confirming that a price move has real conviction behind it rather than being random drift. When a volume surge accompanies a bullish price breakout, it's one of the strongest confirmation signals a momentum trader can see.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某支股票的當日交易量遠超過其正常日均水平，通常達到1.5倍以上。這往往意味著機構投資者（如基金、銀行）正在積極買入或賣出，說明價格走勢背後有真實的資金驅動力，而非隨機波動。當成交量激增伴隨股價突破出現時，對於動量交易者而言，這是最強勁的確認訊號之一。
